title: Spicy Jamaican Vegan Tagine
description: A flavorful and spicy vegan tagine made with ground coriander and served with a side of rice.

ingredients.name: Xtra Hot Peppers
ingredients.notes: depending on desired level of heat

instructions: Heat oil in a tagine or large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the ground coriander and cook for 1 minute.
Add the xtra hot peppers and Jamaican spices and cook for another minute.
Add the canned tomatoes and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook for 20 minutes.
